description: Use this API to change the vsc dc converter node terminal connection in the working case. This api is defined using the converter end bus number and desired node number to connect to at that end. This API routine was first introduced in release 35.5. ierr = station_vscdc_bus_term_chng(name, ibus, inode)

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Quoted name of the vsc dc line whose node terminal data is being changed. (input).

parameters.name: ibus
parameters.description: Bus number of desired converter end being modified. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: inode
parameters.description: Node number to which the converter end is to be attached. node must correspond to ibus. (input).

error_codes.description: bus is not part of a substation.
node-breaker terminal connection table is full.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
bus not a converter bus of vsc dc line.
